meaning: adj.有风的,刮风的,多风的,风强的,腹胀的,吹牛的
examples: It was windy and Jake felt cold.
It was very wet and windy the day I drove over the hill to Del Norte.
It is windy, but it is sunny.
Crossing it on a windy day can make your heart skip a beat or two.
The Super League champions overcame wild and windy conditions, with Kevin Sinfield's kicking proving vital.
